sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الْجَدَّةُ تَقُولُ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ فِي كُلِّ وَقْتٍ.
sentences.translation: Baka bi govorila Elhamdulillah u svako doba.
sentences.translationEn: The grandmother used to say Alhamdulillah at all times.

sentences.arabic: حِينَ شَرِبَتِ الْمَاءَ قَالَتِ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ.
sentences.translation: Kad bi pila vodu rekla bi Elhamdulillah.
sentences.translationEn: When she drank water she said Alhamdulillah.

sentences.arabic: وَحِينَ رَأَتْ شَيْئًا جَمِيلًا قَالَتِ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ أَيْضًا.
sentences.translation: I kad bi vidjela nešto lijepo, rekla bi Elhamdulillah.
sentences.translationEn: And when she saw something beautiful she said Alhamdulillah too.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتْ: الشُّكْرُ يَزِيدُ النِّعْمَةَ وَيُبَارِكُ فِيهَا.
sentences.translation: Rekla je: Zahvalnost povećava blagodati i unosi bereket u njih.
sentences.translationEn: She said: Gratitude increases blessings and brings blessings to them.
